use std::collections::HashMap;

pub fn load_config(path: &str) -> Result<Config, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let config: Config = serde_json::from_str(&data)?;
    Ok(config)
}

pub fn get_value(map: &HashMap<String, String>, key: &str) -> Option<String> {
    map.get(key).cloned()
}

pub fn parse_int(s: &str) -> Result<i32, std::num::ParseIntError> {
    s.parse()
}

pub fn connect(url: &str) -> Result<Connection, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    Connection::new(url)
}

pub fn process_response(resp: &str) -> Result<serde_json::Value, serde_json::Error> {
    serde_json::from_str(resp)
}

pub fn read_file(path: &str) -> Result<String, std::io::Error> {
    std::fs::read_to_string(path)
}

struct Config;
struct Connection;
impl Connection { fn new(_url: &str) -> Result<Self, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> { Ok(Self) } }
